summary: A recorded news segment, posted by the account, following an ICE Denver enforcement operation. Footage includes an officer in a dark 'POLICE' vest and glasses speaking inside a cinderblock-walled room, and a close shot of a paperwork screen displaying a booking-style portrait photo of a man in a 'PHOTO' placeholder box. The narration describes ICE targeting people with criminal records and executing a high-risk warrant. The audio is broadcast reporting and interview speech.

script.scene: An officer in a dark 'POLICE' vest and glasses speaks inside a room with cinderblock walls.
Close shot of a paperwork screen showing a booking-style portrait photo of a man inside a labeled '...PHOTO...' box over a form.
